news.t: Brazilian Stocks Dive Amid Shock Resignation

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped (BZQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Brazil 25-50 index. The fund provides 2x leveraged inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of mid- and large-cap companies operating in Brazil. BZQ was launched on Jun 16, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
